other_observers: Tom Schlosser; Original Observers: Tom Bunker and Tom Schlosser  Independent Observer: Also reported by Richard Stevens on 4-21-2012 via CoBirds
specific_location: Cherry Creek State Park, Marina, south boundary logs.
description: Medium-small gull with a black head and white eye arcs. Mantle darker grey than that of a Ring-billed gull. Narrow white scapular cresent. Tertial cresent also a narrow white band. Primaries solid black. Legs black. Bill blackish red with slight downturn towards the end.Behaviors: Did not see flying, only standing and stretching. Initialy was hidden behind other gulls on the Marina boundary logs. May have been sitting on the log initially. Saw only standard gull resting and preening behavior.Call: none heardPlumage: Adult
photographer: Photographer: Tom Bunker, Tom Bunker, Tom Bunker
